Forbes Finds Forbes Coupons Forbes 8 Forbes Video Dark Capital Forbes Magazine Investing Digest How This Man‚Äôs Bedding Gave Him ‚ÄòFeather Duvet Lung‚Äô Bruce Y. Lee Senior Contributor Opinions expressed by Forbes Contributors are their own. Healthcare I am a writer, journalist, professor, systems modeler, computational and digital health expert, avocado-eater, and entrepreneur, not always in that order. The Corrs‚Äô song ‚ÄúBreathless‚Äù probably doesn‚Äôt refer to a duvet. However, it was this type of fluffy bedding that left a man not only breathless but with a serious lung condition, according to a case report published in the journal BMJ Case Reports . Wondering how something so soft and so comfortable could make you sick and even eventually be life-threatening? Well, go on, go on. This case report may leave you breathless. For the case report, Patrick Liu-Shiu-Cheong of Victoria Hospital and Chris RuiWen Kuo, Struan WA Wilkie, and Owen Dempsey of the Aberdeen Royal Infirmary in the UK told the tale of a 43-year-old man who saw his doctor in November 2016 after three months of feeling very tired and breathless. His doctor initially thought that the man had a lower respiratory tract infection but contrary to the Howard Jones song, things didn‚Äôt get better afterwards. In fact, in December 2016, the man returned with worsening breathlessness to the point where he couldn‚Äôt walk from one room to another without getting out of breath. Here is how bad things got in the words of the patient: ‚ÄúTwo months after the onset of the symptoms, I was unable to stand or walk for more than a few minutes at a time without feeling like I was going to pass out. Going upstairs to bed was a 30‚Äâmin activity as I could only manage two stairs at a time and then needed to sit and rest. I was signed off work and spent most of the time asleep (day and night).‚Äù At first glance, the man didn‚Äôt have any obvious reasons to be so breathless. He wasn‚Äôt a smoker. His workplace didn‚Äôt expose him to anything unusual. His main hobby was playing guitar and saxophone for a band, and nothing indicated that he was sticking either of these instruments up his nostrils. Ah, but one piece of history proved to be important: he had recently ‚Äúacquired‚Äù both a feather duvet and feather pillows. Why was this relevant? Go on, go on. Breathing tests showed that his lungs could not hold or breathe out as much air as normal. Also, oxygen and carbon dioxide weren‚Äôt moving as well between his lungs and his blood vessels as they should. A CT of his chest showed a ‚Äúground glass‚Äù pattern in both of his lungs. Some lymph nodes in his chest were somewhat enlarged as well. These findings were consistent with a condition called HP. No, not the computer manufacturer but hypersensitivity pneumonitis. HP is basically a severe allergic reaction in your lungs. It occurs when your lungs generate an immune reaction to some substance that you continue to breathe in over a period of time. This substance can be dust, mold, bird droppings, or a range of other things, including, duvet roll please, feathers. When the offending substance is feathers in a duvet, HP is called ‚Äúfeather duvet lung.‚Äù When it is feathers on a bird, the term often used is ‚Äúbird fancier‚Äôs lung.‚Äù When HP occurs in a person breeding pigeons, it is called ‚Äúpigeon breeder‚Äôs lung.‚Äù If the feathers were on a human in a giant chicken costume, well that doesn‚Äôt occur often enough to have its own name. Wait there‚Äôs more. Breathing in mold from hay or grain can lead to what‚Äôs called ‚Äúfarmer's lung,‚Äù not to be confused with a farmer‚Äôs tan. ‚ÄúHumidifier lung‚Äù may result from fungus growing in, guess what, humidifiers or some similar air exchange device like an air conditioner. Then there is ‚Äúhot tub lung,‚Äù which may sound a bit sexy, but totally isn‚Äôt. The bacteria in hot tubs can travel through the water vapor into your nose and lungs. Yeah, it‚Äôs not always good if what‚Äôs in a hot tub makes you breathless. The doctor subsequently prescribed the man in the case report steroids to calm the reaction and inflammation in his lungs and told him to get rid of the feather duvet and pillows. As a safeguard, the man also cleaned his dwelling of mold. According to the man, the steroids ‚Äúhad a transformative effect within 2‚Äâdays. At the same time, having assumed that a possible cause of the allergy was feather bedding, I replaced them with hypoallergenic bedding.‚Äù Eventually everything turned to normal for the man. As he related, ‚Äúthe course of steroids continued ultimately for 12 months, with a gradual reduction in dose over time. I have thankfully been able to stop them completely. My oxygen saturation level nowadays is regularly 97%‚Äì98%‚Äâwhich I understand to be normal for someone my age, and I have not had any dizzy turns since recovering. It doesn‚Äôt affect me at all now and my life is pretty much as it was before.‚Äù Fortunately, doctors caught his condition early enough to reverse the inflammation. If HP continues unchecked for too long, lung scarring can result. Such damage, called pulmonary fibrosis, is permanent and irreversible. Not surprisingly pulmonary fibrosis can interfere with your ability to breathe and exchange oxygen and carbon dioxide. If it gets bad enough, it can be life threatening because you gotta be able to breathe to live. So, if something is leaving you breathless and it‚Äôs not someone you fancy, you may want to check your surroundings for anything that may causing an allergic reaction in your lungs. Could it be from your feathering your nest or your cap or anything else? It could also be your hot tub, your air conditioner, or the many bales of hay that you keep in your bedroom. Or perhaps it‚Äôs the pigeons that you are breeding in your kitchen. Before you get too paranoid about your bedding, your air conditioner, or the flocks of pigeons inside your house, keep in mind that conditions like ‚Äúfeather duvet lung‚Äù are still relatively uncommon. That‚Äôs why this case became a case report. Regardless, take any chronic breathlessness that you may have seriously and see your doctor before you get to a point where even the slightest touch and you feel weak. Designed specifically for Intensive Care Units and released by Ascom, this innovative solution helps healthcare professionals gain instant visibility to patient status. BAAR, SWITZERLAND Based on Ascom‚Äôs connectivity, clinical workflow and mobility expertise, the Digistat Patient Watch solution provides clinicians throughout Europe with an innovative solution to address the needs of Intensive Care Units (ICUs). This partnership further expands the existing global relationship between GE and Ascom. In traditional ICUs, each patient is wired to up to ten medical equipment ‚Äì from monitoring devices to ventilators or infusion pumps. These high-end technologies provide clinicians with critical information and alert them when staff intervention is required. But this can sometimes lead to alarm fatigue, with care givers being exposed to up to 1,000 alarms per shift [1] , even though up to 99% of those do not even require clinical intervention [2] . The new alarm management solution called Digistat Patient Watch, collects data from a variety of devices connected to the patient providing a holistic view at the patient bedside level and at the ICU level. Clinicians gain visibility on patient status, highlighting alarms and warnings occurring on any connected device. This critical data can also be displayed on a handheld mobile device, such as the Ascom Myco 2 which is designed specifically for clinical staff. The benefits for healthcare professionals may include helping improve staff efficiency, supporting better organization of patient care and implementing procedures to reduce the number of alarms. ‚ÄúDigistat Patient Watch helps clinicians leverage patient data to increase situational awareness and align priorities. It has the potential to change their practice and improve workflow efficiency‚Äù says Andr√© Neu, Head of Platform Solutions for Ascom. ‚ÄúDigistat Patient Watch is an important addition to GE Healthcare‚Äôs portfolio of solutions for the Intensive Care, and we are delighted with this expanded collaboration with Ascom‚Äù, adds Olivier Bosc, General Manager of Life Care Solutions Europe at GE Healthcare. For more information on the Digistat Patient Watch solution, as well as on Ascom‚Äôs innovative clinical care solutions, please visit: www.ascom.com [1] Alarm fatigue: impacts on patient safety, Ruskin KJ, Hueske-Kraus D. The vision of Ascom is to close digital information gaps allowing for the best possible decisions ‚Äì anytime and anywhere. Ascom‚Äôs mission is to provide mission-critical, real-time solutions for highly mobile, ad hoc, and time-sensitive environments. Ascom uses its unique product and solutions portfolio and software architecture capabilities to devise integration and mobilization solutions that provide truly smooth, complete and efficient workflows for healthcare as well as for industry and retail sectors. Ascom is headquartered in Baar (Switzerland), has subsidiaries in 15 countries and employs around 1,300 people worldwide. Ascom registered shares (ASCN) are listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange in Zurich.

(NASA/JPL/Space Science Institute) SPACE The First Map of Saturn's Moon Titan Just Revealed Some Tantalising Features REUTERS 19 NOV 2019 WASHINGTON (Reuters) - Scientists on Monday unveiled the first global geological map of Saturn's moon Titan including vast plains and dunes of frozen organic material and lakes of liquid methane, illuminating an exotic world considered a strong candidate in the search for life beyond Earth. The map was based on radar, infrared and other data collected by NASA's Cassini spacecraft, which studied Saturn and its moons from 2004 to 2017. Titan, with a diameter of 3,200 miles (5,150 km), is the Solar System's second-biggest moon behind Jupiter's Ganymede. It is larger than the planet Mercury. Organic materials - carbon-based compounds critical for fostering living organisms - play a leading role on Titan. "Organics are very important for the possibility of life on Titan, which many of us think likely would have evolved in the liquid water ocean under Titan's icy crust," said planetary geologist Rosaly Lopes of NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory in California. "Organic materials can, we think, penetrate down to the liquid water ocean and this can provide nutrients necessary for life, if it evolved there," added Lopes, who led the research published in the journal Nature Astronomy . The first global geologic map of Titan. ( NASA/JPL-Caltech/ASU ) On Earth, water rains down from clouds and fills rivers, lakes and oceans. On Titan, clouds spew hydrocarbons like methane and ethane - which are gases on Earth - in liquid form due to the moon's frigid climate. Rainfall occurs everywhere on Titan, but the equatorial regions are drier than the poles, said study co-author Anezina Solomonidou, a European Space Agency research fellow. Plains (covering 65 percent of the surface) and dunes (covering 17 percent of the surface) made up of frozen bits of methane and other hydrocarbons dominate Titan's mid-latitudes and equatorial regions, respectively. Titan is the only Solar System object other than Earth boasting stable liquids on the surface, with lakes and seas of full of methane being major features at its polar regions. Hilly and mountainous areas, thought to represent exposed portions of Titan's crust of water ice, represent 14 percent of the surface. "What is really fun to think about is if there are any ways that those more complex organics can go down and mix with water in the deep icy crust or deep subsurface ocean," JPL scientist and study co-author Michael Malaska said. Noting that on Earth there is a bacterium that can survive just on a hydrocarbon called acetylene and water, Malaska asked, "Could it or something like it live in Titan deep in the crust or ocean where temperatures are a little warmer?" The map was created seven years before the US space agency is set to launch its Dragonfly mission to dispatch a multi-rotor drone to study Titan's chemistry and suitability for life. Dragonfly is scheduled to reach Titan in 2034. "It is not only scientifically important but also really cool - a drone flying around on Titan," Lopes said. "It will be really exciting." (Reporting by Will Dunham; Editing by Tom Brown) ¬© Reuters

Pick your topic and start watching now: VISUAL MARKETING GROWING AN ONLINE BUSINESS Business Focus: It‚Äôs Why Some People Triumph Online and Others Never Make It 258 Shares Buffer Share Pin Tweet Share Email Pamela Wilson Business focus is why some people are able to build the online business they dream of while others think about it ‚Ä¶ but never actually create it? And why is it that some people are able to build an online presence ‚Ä¶ but never get it to the level where they can live off the revenue it creates? Why ‚Äî especially ‚Äî does it seem like certain people come out of nowhere and claim their place in your area of expertise before you‚Äôve had a chance to claim it yourself? So frustrating ‚Ä¶ Welcome to my¬Ýbusiness focus strategy lesson Today, we‚Äôre going to talk about¬Ýwhy focus is important for success. Why it‚Äôs crucial, actually! If we haven‚Äôt met yet, my name is Pamela Wilson ‚Äî and I have been working online since 2010. I‚Äôm a three-time author, a keynote speaker, and an online educator, coach, and mastermind group leader. I help people build online businesses they love . In this article, and in the coming weeks, I‚Äôm sharing my approach to online business growth . It was born from helping thousands of people create the online presence they‚Äôve dreamt of ‚Äî and seeing way too many of them lose focus and struggle to get any results at all. Once you understand my simple approach, you‚Äôll feel much better about where you are in the online business growth process ‚Äî and that‚Äôs a promise. How can I promise you‚Äôre about to feel better? Because once you understand my approach ‚Ä¶ You‚Äôll recognize you don‚Äôt have to master everything about online business all at once Your to-do list will shrink to 25% of its current size You‚Äôll be able to safely ignore 75% of the online information you‚Äôre seeing right now Get ready to start enjoying the process of building your online business ‚Äî maybe for the first time ever! If you are ‚Ä¶ Trying to build an online business because you have deep expertise on a specific topic ‚Äî but you‚Äôre ‚Äúon hold‚Äù because you‚Äôre feeling overwhelmed Wanting to leave a legacy of information and guidance around a topic you‚Äôre passionate about ‚Äî but you don‚Äôt know where to start Passionate about the business idea you‚Äôve imagined ‚Äî but unsure about how to make it happen ‚Ä¶ stick around. What you‚Äôre about to read is critical information that could change the course of your life. Really. How to maintain a business focus the easy way The goal of this series of articles is to help you steadily build the online business you have in mind right now ‚Äî without ever feeling lost and overwhelmed. You‚Äôre about to feel the relief that comes from having a clear business focus. You‚Äôll understand what matters now ‚Äî and what you can ignore. This is the key to making steady progress as you build your online presence! A genius approach to online business building? Not to get too Albert Einstein on you, but ‚Ä¶ Every online business exists in the 'space-time continuum.' Click To Tweet Think about it: You build your website in its own little corner of the internet Search engines find it at the moment in time that it goes live People begin to discover and use it Your relationship with the people you attract grows person-by-person and day-by-day The faster you can create an online business that exists in both space and time, the faster these benefits will accrue: Search engines will drive people to your information You‚Äôll go from imagining the people you want to serve to serving real people Your email list will begin to grow Your products and services will all benefit from the interaction Your revenues and impact will grow year-by-year Are you ready to make this happen? How to avoid falling for every online pitch you see Before we start, I‚Äôve got to warn you about something that‚Äôs critically important. Not paying attention to this will virtually guarantee that you will stay stuck where you are. And you‚Äôll have a lot less money in your bank account. Here‚Äôs the thing ‚Ä¶ When you step into the online space, you‚Äôll meet a whole new cast of characters. And they will try to sell you some pretty compelling stories. I'm here to tell you that the Laws of Physics apply to online business just like offline business. Click To Tweet It takes time to build a successful business ‚Äî offline and online. (I know, radical statement, right?) I want you to embrace this reality ‚Äî because I‚Äôm about to show you how to get time on your side. Trying to build an online business isn‚Äôt as simple as lots of people would have you believe. It has its challenges. There‚Äôs a lot of technology to master. There‚Äôs marketing involved ‚Äî a lot of marketing. Maybe more marketing than you‚Äôre comfortable with. And there are all these moving parts ‚Äî disparate bits of software that needs to interact to present your business and your offers seamlessly. Today, I‚Äôm going to¬Ýdemystify the process of building your online business. You‚Äôre about to save some major frustration, my friend. Money, too! Because it turns out your don‚Äôt need to Buy All The Things and Learn All The Things in order to make it online. I developed this approach to online business building after years of trial and error ‚Äî mine, and the people I taught. It‚Äôs called Plan & Grow BIG. Focus on what really matters in the near future of your business Plan & Grow BIG helps you eliminate that feeling of overwhelm that might be stopping you from making real progress in your online business. Maybe you‚Äôre just getting started with your idea. Or maybe you‚Äôve been trying for years to build a business idea you‚Äôve had in your head ‚Äî but it just isn‚Äôt living up to what you expected. Either way, you‚Äôre in the right place because today‚Äôs information will help you catapult forward. I developed this framework because I saw so many people who were getting sidetracked by online courses, programs, and books they felt they ‚Äúneeded‚Äù to master. For example, I saw people just starting out taking courses on Facebook ads ‚Äî before they knew who they wanted to reach with those ads and what they were going to offer. And I also saw people trying to recruit affiliates before their product was proven in the marketplace. (No self-respecting affiliate will work to sell an unproven product.) I saw a lot of people wasting a lot of time. üôÅ Smart people! People who were accomplished in other areas of their lives. But they were completely baffled by this ‚Äúonline business thing.‚Äù To be perfectly honest, I recognized the need because I had lived the frustrations myself. True confession: I had to learn business focus the hard way Before I outline the Plan & Grow BIG approach and the specifics for each stage, you might be wondering how I figured this whole thing out. I‚Äôm going to share a bit of my story so you know how I came up with this. Back in late 2009, I was managing my booming design and marketing business, Zurek Design. I had national and regional clients and a roster of freelancers who I funneled projects to. I managed everything from my home office, where I was also juggling a new husband and two children who were rapidly approaching their ‚Äúlaunch‚Äù phases ‚Äî they were in high school and starting to look at universities and think about their careers. I didn‚Äôt have a lot of time to spare. Plus, the online business idea I had in mind was going to require me to become much more of a ‚Äúpublic figure‚Äù than I had ever had to be in my business in the past. I‚Äôd have to put my photo on the internet, where anyone could see it! And I‚Äôd need to ‚Äúput myself out there‚Äù on teleclasses, in interviews, on webinars, and in online video. Yikes. And although my offline business was making a solid income, my online business idea ‚Äî to share my marketing and design training with others ‚Äî wasn‚Äôt making a single cent. Who in their right mind invests in a business idea before they know if it will make money? I do, apparently! It turns out that I was more courageous than I knew. Because I did ‚Äî I invested BIG in my idea when I purchased an online course called Teaching Sells. It was close to $2,000 at the time ‚Äî an enormous amount of money to spend on what was basically just a dream at that point. But I‚Äôm glad I did. I truly believe that actions speak louder than words. And when I made that investment, I was telling myself, ‚ÄúThis dream matters. This dream is going to become a reality. I‚Äôm taking this seriously.‚Äù Once I swallowed the fear of investing that much to learn something new, things started happening for me. Within a few months, I (the person who didn‚Äôt want to be seen online) had an article accepted by the company behind the course I took ‚Äî on one of the most-popular websites in the world at the time, Copyblogger. Then another article went live. And another. Not just on Copyblogger but on many of the most-important online blogs of the day. And through it all, my audience grew. I began offering products and then coaching. Out with the old, in with the new (and better) Within a few years, my online business income eclipsed what my offline business made. By early 2014 I shuttered my offline business completely to focus exclusively on my online efforts. Now, I‚Äôm considered an authority on building an online presence. That company that I took the expensive course from? They hired me to teach their audience for a couple of years. Here‚Äôs what‚Äôs different in my life now: My business provides a very comfortable living for our family (and I can work in my pajamas) I am asked to speak and present my knowledge to audiences who are hungry to hear from me My books are well-received and much loved ‚Äî and deliver income to me every single month People find my website and join my community every day, all year long I‚Äôm able to travel anywhere I‚Äôd like because my business fits in my backpack I can ‚Äúdial up‚Äù or ‚Äúdial back‚Äù my working hours as needed because I have complete control over my schedule Here‚Äôs the other important thing ‚Ä¶ I also have complete control over the direction I take my business. I answer to no one but myself! And I can adapt my offerings to what my audience needs whenever I‚Äôd like. But this story isn‚Äôt about me. What I‚Äôm about to share is the exact plan I‚Äôve developed after seeing what truly works online. It‚Äôs the approach that has allowed me to build the business I have today. A business where I‚Äôm in control ‚Äî of my time, my projects, my earnings. And that‚Äôs what I want for you. Ready to make online business building easier? You wouldn‚Äôt have read this far if you didn‚Äôt also want to build this kind of online business! That‚Äôs why I want to make it easier for you. What is your business focus right now? If you can‚Äôt answer that question immediately, read on. How to use Plan & Grow BIG to get the business focus mindset you need The purpose of the Plan & Grow BIG approach is to help you develop business focus ‚Äî and eliminate the feeling of overwhelm that keeps you from making progress. Here‚Äôs the thing: I believe the #1 enemy of online progress is the flood of information about online business tactics that bombards us every day.
